mapper.select: /** UsptBsnsInfoNtcnDao.selectList */ select cc.code as recomend_cl_cd , cc.code_nm as recomend_cl_nm , cc.code_type as recomend_cl_type_cd , (select code_nm from cmmt_code where code_group = '${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@RCT_CODE_GROUP}' and code = cc.code_type) as recomend_cl_type_nm , case when ubin.recomend_cl_cd is null then 'N' else 'Y' end as is_check from cmmt_code cc left outer join uspt_bsns_info_ntcn ubin on ubin.recomend_cl_type_cd = cc.code_type and ubin.recomend_cl_cd = cc.code and ubin.member_id = #{memberId} where cc.code_group = '${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@RC_CODE_GROUP}' and cc.code_type in ('${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@RC_BSR}', '${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@RC_EDU}') order by cc.code_type, sort_order

/** UsptBsnsInfoNtcnDao.selectBsnsPblancList */ select sub.* , lag(sub.pblanc_id, 1) over(order by sub.created_dt desc) as pre_pblanc_id , lead(sub.pblanc_id, 1) over(order by sub.created_dt desc) as next_pblanc_id from ( select ubp.pblanc_id , ubp.pblanc_nm , ubp.pblanc_sumry , ubp.created_dt , (ubp.rcept_endde::date - to_char(now(), 'YYYYMMDD')::date) as rmndr_day , fn_cmm_get_code_nm('${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@PS_CODE_GROUP}', ubp.pblanc_sttus_cd) as pblanc_sttus , array_to_string(array_agg(distinct fn_cmm_get_code_nm('${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@RC_CODE_GROUP}', ubrc.recomend_cl_cd)), ',') as recomend_cl from uspt_bsns_pblanc ubp inner join uspt_bsns_recomend_cl ubrc on ubrc.bsns_cd = ubp.bsns_cd inner join uspt_bsns_info_ntcn ubin on ubin.recomend_cl_cd = ubrc.recomend_cl_cd where ubp.ntce = true and ubp.enabled = true and ubin.member_id = #{memberId} group by ubp.pblanc_id order by ubp.created_dt desc limit 5 ) sub
